title: Levana Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation attack exploiting price discrepancies in volatile markets with high leverage

prevention.rule: Block transactions that exploit price discrepancies in volatile markets with high leverage within a short time frame
prevention.trigger: PRICE_DISCREPANCY -> HIGH_LEVERAGE_MARKET in short time frame

summary: Levana Protocol lost over $1.1M due to an oracle manipulation attack exploiting price discrepancies in volatile markets with high leverage. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for price discrepancies in volatile markets with high leverage within a short time frame.
